summary: Completed testing of Phase 1 (Time Tracking) and Phase 3 (RBAC) features. Backend tests 12/12 passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all requested features working correctly.

issues: React hydration warnings in console about <tr> and <span> elements. Non-blocking but should be fixed for cleaner console.

critical_code_review_comments: TimeTrackingPage.js line 621-626: Table row rendering inside map may cause hydration issues - consider using React.Fragment instead of span wrapper
seed_data_creation: Created test users and sessions for RBAC testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 (Time Tracking) and Phase 3 (RBAC) features fully tested. All endpoints working correctly.

GET /api/roles.details: Returns all 5 roles (admin, supervisor, manager, team_lead, team_member) with permissions. Sorted by level descending.

GET /api/user/permissions.details: Returns current user's role, level, and permissions object with can_view_financial, can_manage_team, can_edit_all, can_delete_all

DELETE /api/team/{user_id}.details: Admin can delete team members. Returns 403 for non-admin. Returns 404 for non-existent user.

POST /api/timer/resume.details: Resumes paused timer, resets start_time while keeping paused_time for total calculation

PATCH /api/time-logs/{id}.details: Updates duration_minutes, description, date, billable. Adjusts task total_tracked_time accordingly.

DELETE /api/time-logs/{id}.details: Deletes time log, updates task total_tracked_time. Returns 404 for non-existent log.

Tasks filtered by role.details: GET /api/tasks applies filter_resources_by_role for team_member role (own tasks only)

PATCH /api/team/{user_id}.details: Admin can update role and skills. Supervisor role change restriction enforced.

team_page_role_permissions_overview.details: Shows all 5 roles with descriptions, Financial badge, No Financial badge, Manage Team badge

team_page_edit_delete_buttons.details: Edit and Delete buttons visible for admin. Edit opens dialog for role/skills. Delete only for admin role.

timer_pause_resume.details: Pause button pauses timer, shows PAUSED badge in global ribbon. Resume button resumes timer, removes badge.

time_log_edit_delete.details: Edit and Delete icons visible on each time log entry. Edit opens dialog, Delete removes entry.

task_creation_with_auto_subtasks.details: Create New Task dialog shows Auto-Create Subtasks section with input field and + button

weekly_timesheet.details: Weekly Timesheet tab shows Day, Date, Total, Billable, Entries columns with week data

mocked_apis.note: Google Drive, Gmail, and Zoho Sign integrations are in DEMO MODE as specified
